lines.text: Welcome to the Nguzo Africa admin dashboard, the control desk for the whole corridor.
If the client posts the demand and the supplier carries it, this is where Nguzo holds the trust between them.
Everything that protects both sides, escrow, permit checks, field verification, settlement, is operated from these screens.
On the left you have seven desks, Overview, Jobs, Ground Force, Verification, Team, Notifications, and Ledger.
We will work through every single one, so you understand not just what each button does, but why it exists.
Let's begin where every shift begins, the Overview.
